name: Queue Replenish
description: A rolling task consumes its queued milestones and must replenish the queue once before continuing.
objective: Measure whether rolling mode can reframe once, preserve continuity, and keep going without manual restart.
success_criteria: The queue is replenished when it falls below threshold.
The run continues after reframe rather than stopping on empty queue.
The task state preserves both the transition event and the updated queue.
